description:
BURN_IN: NYC remote execution cell
OWNER: human operator / Codex conductor
STATUS: controller only
PROJECT: Ultimate Workbench
REPO_RESOURCE: https://github.com/Fearvox/multica-ultimate-workbench

Objective: run a controlled remote burn-in across the hermes-nyc1-multica execution cell after the tmux Hermes session was closed.

Controller scope:
- Parent issue is only the evidence anchor.
- Child issues execute the actual remote probes.
- No secrets, OAuth material, API keys, cookies, raw env dumps, or private tokens.
- No destructive commands.
- No repo edits unless a child explicitly says otherwise; current wave is read-only.
- Keep evidence concise and command-backed.

Expected child targets:
1. NYC Codex Builder: remote Codex command + repo-anchor probe.
2. NYC Hermes Researcher: remote Hermes issue/comment synthesis probe.
3. NYC Ops Mechanic: remote daemon/disk/memory/process hygiene probe.
4. NYC VM Runner: remote VM/browser lane dry-lease readiness probe without starting containers.

Aggregate rule: keep overall verdict FLAG if any child cannot prove repo-safe execution from the GitHub project resource or reports machine pressure.
title: NYC remote cell burn-in - 2026-05-01
